title: Treasury Department Sanctions Over 130 ISIS-Affiliated Crypto Wallets on Tron
snippet: More than 130 Tron wallets connected with a Central Asian ISIS affiliate were sanctioned by the U.S. government, with funds frozen by Tether.

title: Ondo tokenizes BlackRock’s IVV ETF and Micron stock under US custodial model
snippet: Ondo Finance launches tokenized BlackRock IVV ETF and Micron shares under SEC-defined custodial model with Ethereum-based settlement.

title: Ondo Finance launches custodial tokenised securities in the US
snippet: Ondo Finance today announced the first live solution of third-party tokenized U.S. securities operating entirely within the existing regulatory perimeter in the U.S., in partnership with Broadridge Financial Solutions Inc., (NYSE: BR) to provide full voting rights for tokenized equity holders.

title: NCI and DataExpert launch crypto compliance training programme
snippet: The European Anti-Money Laundering Regulation (AMLR) will come into force on 10 July 2027, introducing stricter requirements for financial institutions, crypto-asset service providers (CASPs) and other regulated entities acting as financial gatekeepers

title: Robinhood links with dYdX Labs to launch new DEX Arcus
snippet: The crypto protocol dYdX has rebranded as Arcus and is joining Robinhood’s new blockchain to bring perpetual and tokenized stock trading.

title: Standard Chartered Becomes First Global Bank to Offer Direct USDC Access to Institutions

Morphic launches RGLTD for digital assets
snippet: Morphic Financial Group, the London-based digital financial services group, today announces the launch of RGLTD and the expansion of its strategic partnership with Cashify, creating a new dual-brand operating structure designed to serve the evolving needs of Europe’s regulated digital asset market.

title: Ripple co-founder backs venture launched by US senator's son: Report
snippet: While engaged in negotiations over ethics in a crypto market structure bill in Congress, Senator Kirsten Gillibrand said she had “no involvement” in her son’s derivatives exchange, backed by at least one industry figure.

title: Ark Invest scoops up $18 million in Circle shares as stock dips 41% over past month

title: OFAC sanctions 134 ISIS-K crypto wallet addresses as Tether freezes funds
snippet: OFAC added 134 crypto wallet addresses linked to ISIS-K to its sanctions list, including 131 Tron addresses that received more than $1.4 million in crypto donations, according to Chainalysis.
